visual_description: The audio opens with the loud, insistent, and rapid beeping of a digital alarm or timer, creating a sense of urgency and pressure. A close-up shot focuses on two men in a dimly lit room. The man on the left, in sharp focus, has a look of alarm, with his mouth open as if shouting. He gestures with his hand near his face. The man on the right is out of focus, appearing to be in motion. In the background, a dark, old-fashioned television set sits on a desk. A watermark with Chinese characters, "风行网," is visible in the upper left corner. The camera cuts to a medium close-up of a man in a light blue, collared shirt. He is leaning his head on his hand, looking down with a weary and concerned expression at a laptop screen just out of frame. The lighting is low, casting shadows on his face. The "风行网" watermark remains in the upper left. The view widens to a medium shot of a cluttered office. Several men in light blue shirts are working at desks with laptops. The man from the previous shot is visible in the center, still looking at his screen. The background is filled with maps and charts taped to a large board
